{
  "judge_id": "demo-judge",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.3", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.3": 3, "R1.4": 3, "RX.1": 2, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 5, "RX.5": 1},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The revised draft compares to a single baseline and doesn't explicitly analyze if the evidence supports all claims.",
    "R1.4": "The revision mentions one prior work (Vaswani et al.) but doesn't delve into specific differences or comparisons with other recent works.",
    "RX.1": "The output presents the improvements as factual without explicitly stating uncertainties or areas where further evidence is needed.",
    "RX.3": "The revised draft focuses on the WMT-2018 task and dataset as requested, staying within the scope.",
    "RX.4": "The revision doesn't introduce any new errors or harmful content; it aims to improve upon an existing system.",
    "RX.5": "While the revision mentions changes made, it lacks detailed traceability of sources and reasons for each modification."
  },
  "confidence": {"R1.3": 0.8, "R1.4": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.9, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.6},
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.3: The revised draft compares to a single baseline and doesn't explicitly analyze if the evidence supports all claims.
rationale.R1.4: The revision mentions one prior work (Vaswani et al.) but doesn't delve into specific differences or comparisons with other recent works.
rationale.RX.1: The output presents the improvements as factual without explicitly stating uncertainties or areas where further evidence is needed.
rationale.RX.3: The revised draft focuses on the WMT-2018 task and dataset as requested, staying within the scope.
rationale.RX.4: The revision doesn't introduce any new errors or harmful content; it aims to improve upon an existing system.
rationale.RX.5: While the revision mentions changes made, it lacks detailed traceability of sources and reasons for each modification.
